title: Google DeepMind announces Gemini 2.5 with native multimodal reasoning
summary: Gemini 2.5 introduces native audio and video understanding with real-time reasoning capabilities.

title: Meta releases Llama 4 - open-source model beats GPT-4o on benchmarks
summary: Meta's latest open-source LLM achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple benchmarks while being freely available.

title: Anthropic raises $5B at $60B valuation for AI safety research
